Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-17 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Report Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong performers dominating the momentum rankings. SYRE leads with a composite score of 95.8 (rank 1), driven by extraordinary 1-year returns of 409.25% and remarkable consistency across all timeframes—it passes all ratio consistency checks and trades above all major moving averages. AGX ranks second with comparably strong fundamentals: 229.16% annual returns, 22.18% weekly gains, and a notably high resilience score of 0.9267 on down SPY days, suggesting it holds up better during market stress. Both tickers show clean momentum signals and normal volatility profiles, though AGX exhibits a notable weakness with a 1-month return of only 8.24% after a 22.18% weekly surge, indicating a sharp pullback in shorter timeframes. The correlation data shows SYRE aligns most strongly with high-yield bonds (HYG at 0.475), while both names maintain moderate positive correlation with SPY and QQQ, suggesting they are riding broader market strength rather than trading in isolation.
